company.name: Vihil InfoTech
company.tagline: Build faster with a dependable tech partner.
company.sub_tagline: Your trusted IT partner for web, mobile, AI, and cloud solutions — built for clarity, speed, and long-term growth.

vision.description: We envision technology as a growth engine where AI/ML, product engineering, and cloud infrastructure come together to create measurable business outcomes.

about.headline: We build IT systems that are scalable, secure, and AI-ready — from product discovery to launch and long-term evolution.
about.who_we_are: A product-focused team of engineers, designers, and AI specialists. We partner with startups and enterprises to create practical digital products that solve real business problems.
about.mission: Our mission is to merge business strategy with IT execution and deliver products that create measurable impact.

services.title: Cyber Security

services.title: SEO & Digital Marketing
services.desc1: Data-backed SEO, technical optimization, and digital campaigns to grow visibility and ROI.

services.title: PWA Development
services.desc1: Progressive Web Apps with React/Next.js for fast, reliable, installable cross-device experiences.

services.title: Desktop Application Development
services.desc1: Cross-platform desktop apps using Electron and React for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

faqs.question: What services does Vihil InfoTech offer?
faqs.answer: Web development (React/Next.js), mobile apps (React Native/iOS/Android), AI/ML integration (LLMs, RAG, automation), cloud infrastructure, cybersecurity, SEO, PWA, and desktop app development.

faqs.question: What technologies does your team specialize in?
faqs.answer: React, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, React Native, Python, FastAPI, LangChain, PHP, Shopify, Android, iOS, TypeScript, and Cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure).

faqs.question: How experienced is your team?
faqs.answer: 20+ experienced professionals with 60+ completed projects, 60+ happy clients, and a 4.8 rating.

faqs.question: Can you handle both small projects and large-scale enterprise solutions?
faqs.answer: Yes. We work with startups and enterprises, from MVPs to complex enterprise platforms.

faqs.question: What is your development process?
faqs.answer: Research → Plan → Implement → Test & Deliver → Optimize. Using agile Scrum and Kanban.

faqs.question: Do you integrate AI and ML into products?
faqs.answer: Yes. LLM assistants, RAG, generative AI workflows, data intelligence, and AI Ops using FastAPI, LangChain, Node.js, and cloud.

faqs.question: How do you ensure security?
faqs.answer: Security audits, secure coding, penetration testing, compliance reviews, and dedicated cybersecurity services.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing support?
faqs.answer: Yes. Post-launch support, maintenance, and continuous optimization.

faqs.question: How can I get a quote?
faqs.answer: Email vihil3010@gmail.com, call +91 7016421339, or book a call at https://www.vihilinfotech.com/. We reply within 24 hours.

faqs.question: Where is Vihil InfoTech located?
faqs.answer: 207, Vihil Infotech Private Limited, Sky Tatva-1, Opposite Amba Aashram, College Road, Nadiad, Gujarat, India.

faqs.question: What sets Vihil InfoTech apart?
faqs.answer: AI-first thinking, scalable modular systems, and reliable agile delivery. We merge business strategy with IT execution.

faqs.question: Can you provide references or case studies?
faqs.answer: Yes. Contact vihil3010@gmail.com for case studies and references relevant to your industry.
